description_long: This is a tall, rectangular, rust-colored metal bucket with a slightly tapered body and a flat base. The surface is heavily weathered, showing a mottled, oxidized texture typical of aged steel or iron. A single, thin, arched handle is attached at the top, likely made of metal and designed for carrying. The bucket appears to have a closed top, possibly with a lid, and no visible spout or pouring lip. There are no visible markings, labels, or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian, industrial look. Its size and robust construction suggest it could be used for carrying or storing materials in an urban or outdoor setting.
description: A tall, rusted metal bucket with a thin arched handle and a weathered, industrial appearance. The surface is mottled and oxidized, with no visible markings or decorations.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall, rectangular body and the thin arched handle extending from the top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the broad, flat face and the handle arching above, with the weathered surface clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the same tall, rectangular profile and handle.
description_view_3: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with a broad, flat face and the handle visible above.
